scores.correctness_notes: General concepts about when to request certificates are partially correct (initial setup, expiry, revocation), but the agent misses the request_errors scenario with specific error codes (101, 102, 103, 201) mentioned in the gold standard. Event names differ: gold standard cites certificate_invalidated, not certificate_revoked/certificate_removed.
scores.hallucination_notes: Multiple suspect items: certificate_removed event not in gold standard; certificate_revoked vs certificate_invalidated mismatch; renew_certificate(), get_assigned_certificates(), set_relation_certificate(), CertificateRequestAttributes are all described as if definitive but come from the deprecated v4 library and may not match the current charmlibs interface spec. The response conflates the older TLSCertificatesRequiresV4 API with the current charmlibs.interfaces.tls_certificates package.
